content:aca3b55c717a5c75.title: News: GP Webinar summary: 26 February 2026
content:aca3b55c717a5c75.content: Find a summary of recent meetings at any time by putting 'GP webinar' into the NCL General Practice Website's search bar.

content:b8a0f8ed4e800243.title: News: RFL releases guidance on ultrasound clinical vetting
content:b8a0f8ed4e800243.content: Royal Free London (RFL) has updated its ultrasound vetting guidance in line with NCL vetting guidelines. The trust will only be able to conduct ultrasound examinations that meet specific criteria.

metadata.description: Royal Free London (RFL) has updated its ultrasound vetting guidance in line with NCL vetting guidelines. The trust will only be able to conduct ultrasound examinations that meet specific criteria.

content:ea098adae90b1e89.title: News: Support London-wide campaign to reduce medicine waste
content:ea098adae90b1e89.content: Resources for practices and pharmacies to use to encourage patients to only order the right quantity of medicines for their needs to help cut waste and prevent shortages.

metadata.description: Resources for practices and pharmacies to use to encourage patients to only order the right quantity of medicines for their needs to help cut waste and prevent shortages.

content:0f542d9be7fc9a8b.title: Event: NCL Education Faculty Facilitation Skills Workshop
content:0f542d9be7fc9a8b.content: This in-person workshop is free to attend for all Primary Care roles who lead, or are preparing to lead, small teams within and across organisations and neighbourhoods. Starts at 2.30pm on Thursday 23 April.

content:35bef5d5a8a657d6.title: On Demand Training: Suicide Awareness and Response e-learning for Primary Care
content:35bef5d5a8a657d6.content: The e-learning on suicide awareness and the use of the Suicide Assessment Framework e-Tool (SAFETool) is designed to equip clinical primary care staff with an understanding of their role in suicide prevention.

content:06252f824df806dc.title: News: New GP Feedback & Alert system to replace Quality Alerts from 9 March
content:06252f824df806dc.content: A single route for GPs to raise concerns with providers is being launched, replacing all Quality Alerts and GP liaison clinical emails. Find the new GP Feedback & Alert form in your NCL Global folder in EMIS.

content:7a5b9b4aa8a47c80.title: Event: Mild Traumatic Brain Injury: A practical update on assessment and management
content:7a5b9b4aa8a47c80.content: This one hour session will provide an update on the assessment and management of mild traumatic brain injury (TBI), featuring insights on neuroimaging and recovery promotion. Join at 6pm on Monday 23 March.
